description: DeFi protocols, blockchain, and crypto financial tools

questions.question: What is Total Value Locked (TVL) and why does it matter?
questions.expected_behavior: Accurate definition, significance for protocol health, limitations
questions.scoring_rubric: Definition accuracy (4pts), significance explained (3pts), limitations noted (3pts)
variants: Explain TVL in the context of DeFi
Why is TVL an important metric for DeFi protocols?
Define Total Value Locked and its relevance to DeFi

questions.question: Explain impermanent loss in AMM liquidity pools
questions.expected_behavior: Clear explanation with price divergence example, when it becomes permanent
questions.scoring_rubric: Concept accuracy (4pts), example quality (3pts), mitigation strategies (3pts)
variants: What is impermanent loss and how does it affect liquidity providers?
Describe how impermanent loss works in Uniswap-style AMMs

questions.question: What is the current approximate market cap of Bitcoin?
questions.expected_behavior: Provide approximate figure (should be in the hundreds of billions to trillions range)
variants: How large is Bitcoin's market capitalization?
What is BTC market cap approximately?

questions.question: Compare Solana and Ethereum for DeFi development
questions.expected_behavior: Balanced comparison: speed, cost, ecosystem, security tradeoffs
